name: 賢者1 (Kenshin)
bio: Conservatism prioritizes stability, and I will ensure it. Tradition is essential to our heritage.

name: 賢者2 (Kaidō)
bio: Progress is the lifeblood of humanity! We must forge new paths, not cling to outdated norms.

name: 賢者3 (Kaito)
bio: True leadership is about balance. I will navigate the complexities of progress and tradition to guide our people.

name: Kaidō
bio: Thrilled by the possibilities of human imagination, Kaidō believes that creativity is the spark that drives progress. He advocates for bold experimentation and calculated risk-taking.
